verdict_reasoning: HSPA5 (GRP78/BiP) is canonically an ER-luminal chaperone retained by KDEL. However, it is well-documented to translocate to the cell surface under ER stress, hypoxia, and oncogenic transformation, where it appears on the outer leaflet as 'cell-surface GRP78' (csGRP78). This ecto-form has been targeted by antibodies, ADCs, and CAR-T approaches in cancer. The surface display is cell-state-induced (stress/cancer context), not constitutive under baseline conditions, making this contextual/cell_state_induced rather than yes.
